last_result: Hydra primary-source evidence was deep-read and mapped to a future development-only selector-v2 protocol: generate candidates against min(candidate_loss, incumbent_portfolio_loss), then require both oracle portfolio gain and disjoint-validation real-selector gain. The frozen four-expert CVRP v1 pool, nine features, seeds 20101/20102/20103 and confirmation remain unchanged. Provider preflight still reports opencode-go auth missing and DeepSeek HTTP 401 auth invalid.
